reference: My four-year-old son has had two nosebleeds in the past few days. He had acute immune thrombocytopenic purpura when he was thirteen months old, and I can't get the image of the children in the pediatric oncology center where he was treated out of my mind. Is this worth a visit to the doctor for a blood test, or should I wait a few more days?
text: My 4-year-old son has had 2 nosebleeds in the past few days. He had acute immune thrombocytopenic purpura when he was 13 months old, and I can't get the image of the children in the pediatric oncology center where he was treated out of my mind. Is this worth a visit to the doctor for a blood test, or should I wait a few more days?
